Bash(cd "C:\\Padoque\\scotty-ops" && python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('BrandBook.pdf'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
for i in range\(min\(5, len\(doc\)\)\):
    page = doc[i]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(text[:2000]\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Padoque\\scotty-ops" && py -3.11 -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('BrandBook.pdf'\)
print\(f'Total pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
for i in range\(min\(15, len\(doc\)\)\):
    page = doc[i]
    text = page.get_text\(\).strip\(\)
    if text:
        print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:3000]\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Padoque\\scotty-ops" && py -3.11 -c "
import fitz
import os
doc = fitz.open\('BrandBook.pdf'\)
os.makedirs\('_brandbook_pages', exist_ok=True\)
for i in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[i]
    mat = fitz.Matrix\(1.5, 1.5\)  # 1.5x zoom for readability
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(matrix=mat\)
    pix.save\(f'_brandbook_pages/page_{i+1:02d}.png'\)
    print\(f'Saved page {i+1}'\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>&1)
